# Waveband Communications LLC

Waveband Communications, L.L.C. provides two-way radio accessories. The Company offers durable speaker microphones, antennas, batteries, and surveillance kits. Waveband Communications serves customers Worldwide.

results.title: Entity Information - SAM.gov
excerpts:
# Entity Information

We are bringing together entity information in one place, including: Entity Registrations, Exclusions, Disaster Response Registry, and Responsibility/Qualification data.

* [Learn how we are connecting information across SAM.gov](https://www.fsd.gov/gsafsd_sp?id=kb_article_view&sysparm_article=KB0062290)
* [FAPIIS.gov is now Responsibility/Qualification. Learn more.](https://www.fsd.gov/gsafsd_sp?id=kb_article_view&sysparm_article=KB0062291)

### Please Sign In

## Search Entity Information

Dropdown 1 Select Domain... All Entity Information Responsibility/Qualification Disaster Response Registry Entities

Text Field

Show active only

## Register Your Entity or Get a Unique Entity ID

Register your entity or get a Unique Entity ID to get started doing business with the federal government

Get Started

Sign into your entity workspace to renew or update your entity

Renew Entity

Check the status of a recently submitted entity registration or renewal
Check Entity Status

## Additional Free Entity Resources

Image

APEX Accelerators (formerly known as PTACs) are an official government contracting assistance resource for small business. Find your local APEX Accelerators (formerly known as PTACs) to get free help getting started doing business with the federal government.

[APEX Accelerators](https://www.apexaccelerators.us/#/) (formerly known as [PTACs](https://www.aptac-us.org/) )

**Find Small Business Partners**  
The Small Business Administration's (SBA) DSBS can be used to identify potential small business contractors.

[SBA Dynamic Small Business Search (DSBS)](https://dsbs.sba.gov/search/dsp_dsbs.cfm)

**Product and Service Classification**  
Look up classifications for the goods and services your entity provides.

[Product Service Code Manual](https://www.acquisition.gov/psc-manual)  
[North American Industry Classification System (NAICS)](https://www.census.gov/naics/)

**Past Performance**  
Go to CPARS.
gov to evaluate and review contractor past performance (federal users only) or to view your evaluations by the federal government (non-federal users).

[CPARS.gov](https://cpars.gov/)

## Exclusions Resources

* Exclusion Types
* Legacy CT Codes
* Agency Points of Contact

## Integrate With Data Services

**Download Data Files**

Generate and download Entity Extracts, Exclusions Extracts, and Responsibility/Qualification data reports (formerly in fapiis.gov).

* Go to Entity Data Files
* Go to Exclusions Data Files
* Go to Responsibility/Qualification Report

**APIs and System Connections**

Connect your system to APIs for Entity, Exclusions, and Responsibility/Qualification data.

* [Go to the Entity Management API](https://open.gsa.gov/api/entity-api/)
* [Go to the Exclusions API](https://open.gsa.gov/api/exclusions-api/)
* [Go to the Responsibility/Qualification API](https://open.gsa.gov/api/entity-api/)

**Frequently Asked Questions**

Learn more about using SAM.

results.title: How We Hire - Sierra Nevada Corporation | SNC
excerpts:
Government process, not an SNC one; information on security clearances can be found online: https://www.dcsa.mil/mc/pv/mbi/gicp/ https://gogovernment.org/background-checks-and-security-clearances-for-federal-jobs/

### Does SNC do a background/drug check during the recruitment process?

If you are offered and accept a position, SNC requires a drug screening and background check to be completed successfully prior to hire.

### Does SNC accept resumes from external staffing agencies?

SNC does NOT accept unsolicited resumes from third-party staffing firms.

### How do I know if I'm applying to a legitimate job posting?

Today’s scammers are getting more sophisticated. They often attempt to get sensitive personal or financial information from candidates. SNC will not ask for money, fees, or bank information as a precondition of employment. SNC conducts all electronic correspondence via email addresses that end in “@sncorp.com.
” If someone is reaching out to you with an invalid address using a commercial domain, such as Gmail or Yahoo, the information is illegitimate. Some known phishing emails being used are careers.sncorp.com@gmail.com and snc-careers@gmail.com. Do not respond if you are contacted over the phone or emailed by a company listing an SNC job and requesting your personal information or payments. SNC has no responsibility for fraudulent offers and advises all interested applicants to apply directly via the sncorp.com/careers site to avoid fraudulent job ads. Check SNC’s career page for a job listing. If you believe you have been the victim of a fraudulent job offer concerning SNC, please contact us at recruiting@sncorp.com with “Fraudulent Job Offer” in the subject line.

## How to Verify a SNC Recruiter or Job Opportunity

* We will never ask for your sensitive personal or financial information.
* We advise all interested applicants to apply for a job directly from the sncorp.
com/careers site to avoid fraudulent job ads.
* SNC’s email domain is @sncorp.com. If someone is reaching out to you with an invalid address using a commercial domain, such as Gmail, Yahoo, etc., the information is illegitimate.
* Some known phishing emails being used are:  
  careers.sncorp.com@gmail.com and snc-careers@gmail.com

If you believe you have been the victim of a fraudulent job offer concerning SNC, please contact us at recruiting@sncorp.com with “Fraudulent Job Offer” in the subject line. We may request that you forward any suspect emails you have received.

[Search Open Positions](https://snc.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/SNC_External_Career_Site/) [Join Our Talent Pool](https://pages.beamery.com/sncorpcomcareers/page/snc-genpage)

results.title: Aerospace & Defense - Sierra Nevada Corporation | SNC
excerpts:
(GA-ASI) to define and execute production and manufacturing teaming relationships for its Freedom Trainer™. This strategic collaboration would combine SNC’s clean-sheet design with the expertise of Northrop Grumman and GA-ASI, to deliver a zero-compromise training solution for the U.S. Navy’s Undergraduate Jet Training System (UJTS) program. Read Now

## More than a job.  
It’s a mission.

Let your career soar at SNC.

[JOIN OUR TALENT POOL](https://flows.beamery.com/sncorpcomcareers/SAOC_join_us "JOIN OUR TALENT POOL")

## Our Capabilities

##### Aircraft Integration & Modification

Optimize operations with innovative, modular, mission-tailored aircraft system design and modification solutions.

Learn More

##### Secure ISR Solutions

Swift, flexible and comprehensive C5ISR solutions designed to solve the most difficult operational challenges.

Learn More

##### Digital RF
Re-engineering the connected battlefield through interoperable solutions from sensor-to-shooter, across all domains.

Learn More

See All

## Our Impact

Led by diverse and passionate teams of scientists, engineers and dedicated professionals, we work together to solve difficult challenges in aerospace, security and defense to help our government, global partners and commercial customers achieve their missions — safely and securely.

K+ Employees

\+ Years of Experience

\+ Global Locations

## Join The Team

Our vision is to become the leading aerospace, security and defense innovator, while protecting freedom, making the world a better place, and inspiring the next generation.

Careers

## Social Impact

Our mission and pay-it-forward culture are strengthened by the efforts of the Ozmen Foundation, corporate donations and employee volunteerism to drive innovation, fuel entrepreneurship and make a difference in our local, national and global communities.​

Company
## News & Innovation

Learn more about how our mission-focused solutions can help solve your aerospace, security and defense challenges.

PRESS RELEASE ###### SNC Invests in the Future of the Army, Procures Fourth ... SNC has answered the Pentagon’s call to lean forward through investment to drive innovation and speed in future-proof technology. At the close of 2025, the company purchased at its own expense, a Bombardier Global 6500 aircraft intended for the Army’s High Accuracy Detection and Exploitation System (HADES) program of record. Read Now

PRESS RELEASE ###### SNC Recognized as a US Best Managed Company for Third Y... SNC has been selected as a US Best Managed Company for a third year, highlighting its excellence in strategic planning, execution and financial performance. Read Now

PRESS RELEASE ###### SNC Marks Arrival of Fourth SAOC Aircraft at its Aviati... Major milestone comes as SNC observes one-year anniversary of contract win Read Now
